overall.description: A cinematic nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring wet streets with neon reflections, holographic advertisements, and dense urban architecture. The camera follows a character through intersections, covered walkways, and commercial streets lined with glowing signage.

futuristic vehicle passes by on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, with the camera crossing wet asphalt reflecting neon lights. The scene transitions from the open intersection into a covered pedestrian walkway lined with concrete pillars and glowing shop signs.

events.description: camera follows the character turning slightly left to stay on the sidewalk path

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a character in a brown jacket past the autoparts store

notable_agents.action: character in brown jacket walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign reading 'AUTOPARTS' in red and white letters
ground-level shop with green trim and illuminated windows
sparse trees lining the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial street dominated by a large vertical 'AUTOPARTS' neon sign. The camera follows a character in a brown jacket along the wet concrete sidewalk, passing the autoparts storefront with its green-trimmed entrance while sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction.

events.description: approaching area with large cylindrical holographic display on the left
pedestrian density increases with groups walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through a busier section of the street with more pedestrians and prominent holographic displays

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking and conversing on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large glowing blue cylindrical hologram displaying animated figures
shop front with prominent purple neon lighting and signage
neon sign for 'KIROSHI' with Japanese characters
metal railings separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The street becomes more crowded as the camera passes a large cylindrical holographic display projecting blue animated figures. The Kiroshi corporate sign becomes visible in the distance on the right, while purple neon storefronts line the left side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with Kiroshi signage and barriers

events.description: passing the prominent Kiroshi neon sign on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the Kiroshi sign and metal street barriers

entered.detail: continuous metal barrier running along the edge of the sidewalk
tall buildings covered in colorful neon advertisements in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera passing the prominent Kiroshi neon sign on the right, with continuous metal railings lining the sidewalk. The holographic displays from the previous section are now behind, replaced by dense neon signage on distant buildings as the walk continues through the rain-slicked streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk intersection that evolves into a dense, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins by crossing wet asphalt reflecting vibrant lights before transitioning from the open intersection into a covered pedestrian walkway defined by concrete pillars and glowing shop signs. As the camera follows a character in a brown jacket, the scene shifts toward a commercial street dominated by a large vertical autoparts sign and green-trimmed storefronts. The environment then becomes more crowded, passing a large cylindrical holographic display of blue animated figures and purple neon storefronts before turning toward a prominent Kiroshi corporate sign. Finally, the camera moves past the Kiroshi signage and metal railings, leaving the holograms behind as the path opens into a vista of dense neon signage on distant buildings.
